evals.prompt: Break this accepted plan into agent-ready issues: users can save search filters, reopen them from a sidebar, rename them, and delete them. Backend persistence and UI are both needed. We want work that can be parallelized safely.
evals.expected_output: A dependency-ordered set of vertical-slice issues with scope, out of scope, acceptance criteria, verification, and agent context.
expectations: Splits work into vertical slices instead of separate backend-only and UI-only layers.
Includes dependency ordering or blocked-by relationships.
Gives behavior-facing acceptance criteria for each slice.
Includes verification checks and agent context for implementation.
